response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile-platform expertise—key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and knowledge sharing (workshops, talks)
Broad stack expertise across mobile, web, and embedded systems with demonstrated systems design skills
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership experience beyond technical roles
Limited evidence of mobile platform expertise despite role focus on mobile ecosystem productivity
No mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change initiatives required for Level II Manager
